heading: Today
text: Sunshine. A chilly start, then not as cold this afternoon.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Mostly clear. Chilly, but not as cold.
temperature: Upper teens and 20s, near 30 in the warmer valleys west and south.

heading: Friday
text: Sun to clouds south. Showers likely north midday and afternoon.
temperature: Mid 40s to mid 60s, northwest to southeast
